summary: Tested new pack system features: 7 packs, Coder Pro trial, age-gate (Companion), coming-soon (Innovator). Backend: 36/36 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified - 7 pack cards, correct badges, age-gate modal, trial banner, Innovator disabled. Fixed 1 backend bug during testing.

minor.issue: Did not call ensure_user_has_starter_pack() for brand-new users. If this endpoint was called before /api/user/packs or /api/user/active-pack (e.g., via Promise.all on first load), it would return is_trial=False for new users before their packs were initialized. FIXED: Added `await ensure_user_has_starter_pack(user_id)` call.
minor.priority: MEDIUM - was causing test failures, may cause first-load trial banner not showing

issues: Trial banner displays '15/20 builds remaining' format which shows remaining/max. Minor UX: '15/20' looks like a progress indicator of used actions (15 used of 20) but actually means 15 remaining. Could say '15 of 20 builds left' for clarity.

critical_code_review_comments: Bug FIXED: GET /api/user/trial-status now calls ensure_user_has_starter_pack() - this ensures new users see correct trial status even when this endpoint is hit first

Pack seeding works correctly with 7 packs: coder (free), friend ($2.99), companion ($4.99, age_gate=True), coder-pro ($4.99), researcher ($4.99), taskmaster ($7.99), innovator ($9.99, coming_soon=True)
Age-gate flow works correctly: unlock -> activate (403 age_gate_required) -> age-verify -> activate (200 activated)
Coming-soon check works: Innovator returns 403 coming_soon on activate regardless of unlock status
New user trial: ensure_user_has_starter_pack creates is_trial=True Coder Pro pack + fallback Coder pack
Trial counter in agentic-chat: increments trial_actions_used on each tool-use prompt, expires trial at max_actions

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 pack cards, badges, age-gate modal, trial banner all working)

test_credentials.admin_state: Companion active (age_verified=True) - restored to pre-test state

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created via new_user_session fixture (TEST_packtest_*@example.com). Trial test used DB manipulation to set admin to trial state, then restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack system now has 7 packs. Admin user: Companion active, age_verified. Key test data: new users get Coder Pro trial (is_trial=True, 20 action max). Age-gate flow: must unlock + call age-verify + then activate for Companion. Innovator always blocks with 403 coming_soon. Trial banner testID='trial-banner' shows on chat tab when active pack is_trial=True. Fixed bug: get_trial_status now properly initializes packs for new users.

trial_status_bug.bug: GET /api/user/trial-status returned is_trial=False for brand new users
trial_status_bug.root_cause: The endpoint did not call ensure_user_has_starter_pack(user_id). When frontend calls Promise.all([getPacksRes, trialRes]) simultaneously, the trial-status response would arrive before user packs were created, so no active trial pack existed yet.
trial_status_bug.fix: Added `await ensure_user_has_starter_pack(user_id)` before the user_packs lookup in get_trial_status endpoint
